name: Marinara Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tomatoes in batches in a blender container; blend until smooth or puree the tomatoes.
2. In a skillet, sauté onion, carrots, and garlic in oil just until tender (do not brown).
3. Combine all ingredients in a Crock-Pot. Stir well.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 10 hours.
5. Remove the cover, stir well, and cook on High for the last hour for a thicker marinara sauce.
About 6 cups.
